title: triplaris dugandii
intro: Triplaris dugandii, also known as Colombian copal or copal tree, is a species of plant in the family Polygonaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Triplaris dugandii include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a diuretic and to alleviate symptoms of fever. Triplaris dugandii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
